Subject
Missing documents for XYZ Corp VAT return
Message
Hi Michael, We're still waiting on 5 items for your VAT return, which is due in 3 days. Outstanding items: • Amazon receipt (15 Jan) — £45.99 • Equipment invoice — £123.00 • [3 more items] You can upload these directly here: [Upload Link] Best regards, James Blackwell

Callback requested · Today at 10:34
Sarah Mitchell
Today at 10:34 · 4 min 23 sec
Callback requested
AI Summary

New potential client enquiring about VAT registration. Explained £85,000 threshold and voluntary registration benefits. Booked 30-minute discovery call for Thursday at 2pm.

Key Points
  • Growing e-commerce business approaching VAT threshold
  • Interested in voluntary registration for credibility
  • Discovery call booked Thu 2pm
Caller tone: Curious and engaged
Offlode Insight
This is a new lead showing strong buying signals. A prompt callback could convert to a high-value client.

Subject
Missing documents for XYZ Corp VAT return
Message
Hi Michael, We're still waiting on 5 items for your VAT return, which is due in 3 days. Outstanding items: • Amazon receipt (15 Jan) — £45.99 • Equipment invoice — £123.00 • [3 more items] You can upload these directly here: [Upload Link] Best regards, James Blackwell

Review before sending to Michael
Subject
Following up on your call — XYZ Corp
Message
Hi Michael, Thanks for your call earlier. I wanted to follow up on the points you raised. Regarding the VAT deadline: Unfortunately HMRC deadlines are fixed, but we can discuss options. I'm available: • Tomorrow 10:00 - 11:00 • Thursday 14:00 - 16:00 Best regards, James Blackwell

Subject
Payment reminder — Invoice INV-2026-001

Hi David, I wanted to follow up on invoice INV-2026-001 for £2,400.00, which was due on 15 January. If there's anything preventing payment, please let me know. Our bank details are on the invoice, or pay here: [Payment Link] Best regards, James Blackwell
